mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.reservations_id as reservationsId, p.payment_method_id as paymentMethodId, p.coupon_id as couponId, p.payment_amount as paymentAmount, p.payment_date as paymentDate, p.payment_status as paymentStatus, p.toss_payment_key as tossPaymentKey, p.refund_amount as refundAmount, p.refund_date as refundDate, p.updated_at as updatedAt FROM payments_tbl p WHERE p.reservations_id = #{reservationsId} ORDER BY p.payment_date DESC

SELECT p.id, p.reservations_id as reservationsId, p.payment_method_id as paymentMethodId, p.coupon_id as couponId, p.payment_amount as paymentAmount, p.payment_date as paymentDate, p.payment_status as paymentStatus, p.toss_payment_key as tossPaymentKey, p.refund_amount as refundAmount, p.refund_date as refundDate, p.updated_at as updatedAt FROM payments_tbl p JOIN reservations_tbl r ON p.reservations_id = r.id JOIN member_tbl m ON r.member_id = m.id WHERE m.id = #{memberId} ORDER BY p.payment_date DESC

SELECT p.id, p.reservations_id as reservationsId, p.payment_method_id as paymentMethodId, p.coupon_id as couponId, p.payment_amount as paymentAmount, p.payment_date as paymentDate, p.payment_status as paymentStatus, p.toss_payment_key as tossPaymentKey, p.refund_amount as refundAmount, p.refund_date as refundDate, p.updated_at as updatedAt FROM payments_tbl p WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.reservations_id as reservationsId, p.payment_method_id as paymentMethodId, p.coupon_id as couponId, p.payment_amount as paymentAmount, p.payment_date as paymentDate, p.payment_status as paymentStatus, p.toss_payment_key as tossPaymentKey, p.refund_amount as refundAmount, p.refund_date as refundDate, p.updated_at as updatedAt FROM payments_tbl p WHERE p.toss_payment_key = #{tossPaymentKey}
